New ### Quick summary - The article compares nine leading premium rewards cards, focusing on benefits such as lounge access, statement credits and travel protections. - Key evaluation areas include welcome offers, redemption flexibility, earning potential at select merchants and notable perks for travelers. - Some cards are best suited for frequent flyers of specific airlines or loyalists of certain hotel brands, while others offer broader travel value. - The right choice depends on your travel habits, spending patterns and which benefits you can maximize. #### What to consider - Annual fees and authorized user policies vary widely, with some cards offering complimentary authorized users and others charging additional fees. - Redemption options differ, with the highest value often found in cards that allow transfers to multiple airline or hotel partners. - Travel and purchase protections, as well as lounge access rules, can be complex and may require enrollment or meet certain eligibility criteria. ### What you'll miss from the article - A detailed side-by-side breakdown of each card's strengths, including lounge access, statement credits and unique travel protections. Generated by AI with support from our editorial team. Show summary Premium credit cards can [unlock luxury perks](https://thepointsguy.com/credit-cards/credit-card-travel-perks/), airport lounge access and high-value rewards, but they can also come with hefty annual fees and a laundry list of benefits.
